privileged_info_summary: The task configures a Moodle assignment with three verifiable key properties: course short name 'ETHICS101', assignment name 'Final Capstone Paper', and file type restriction to '.pdf'. All metadata claims were verified against task description text and database query logic in export_result.sh script, which explicitly searches for these exact values in the Moodle database schema (mdl_course and mdl_assign tables).
